name: Menu_Resguardos
wl_code:
nPasa is int=0
IF sIdentifier="46" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 46, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 47, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 48, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 49, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 47, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 48, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 49, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="47" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 47, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nPasa=1
ELSE IF sIdentifier="48" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 48, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nPasa=1
ELSE IF sIdentifier="49" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 49, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nPasa=1
END
IF nPasa=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 47, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado47 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 48, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado48 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 49, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado49 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked

SIATEC1_IA
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 46, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado47=1 AND nEstado48=1 AND nEstado49=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado47=0 AND nEstado48=0 AND nEstado49=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado47=1 OR nEstado48=1 OR nEstado49=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
END
Local procedure Menu_Sol_Bien
